title: columella japonica
intro: Columella japonica, also known as Japanese Columella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Labiatae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Columella japonica include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Columella japonica is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
